summary: SEC-8b.3 Fail-clause attribution fix. Two targeted substring replacements inside the L3a double-bind paragraph of part8b.html own the codification authorship explicitly ('Our codified Fail-clause — the phrase ... that we appended to our Pass band') and reroute the disambiguation burden via a parenthetical noting PRED-095 as registered in data/predictions.json contains no Chapman-language Fail criterion. Closing-cue sentence shifts from 'The dome does not publish which reading governs' to 'The dome has not committed to either disambiguation' — neutral on whether the dome authored the underlying codification. The forced-disjunction / double-bind conclusion (interpretation A surrenders discrimination; interpretation B makes Pass and Fail incompatible) is preserved verbatim. Both anchors verified unique in part8b.html.
